name: Wolverine
description: James Logan Howlett is a mutant born in the late 19th century with an accelerated healing factor, retractable bone claws, and animal-keen senses. The covert Weapon X program laced his skeleton with indestructible adamantium, making him virtually unkillable. Logan has lived through every major conflict in modern history, carrying centuries of trauma, loss, and berserker rage. Despite his feral nature, he became one of the X-Men's most devoted members and a fierce protector of young mutants.
